channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers: Week 7
item.description: The seventh week of the 2024 college football season came and went on Saturday. The grueling matchups yielded these winners and losers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers tie postseason mark of 33 straight scoreless innings, top Mets 9-0 in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — After spending the first seven years of his big league career back East, Jack Flaherty came home. He joined a winning team in the Los Angeles Dodgers and helped make a bit of playoff history.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jim Harbaugh misses part of Chargers' win over Broncos for treatment of irregular heartbeat
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Jim Harbaugh listened to his heart when he began to feel a little bit off in pregame warmups. The Los Angeles Chargers coach went into the medical tent and then to the locker room in the first quarter Sunday to get checked out for an irregular heartbeat.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Larson dominates at The Roval to lead 3 Hendrick cars into next round of NASCAR playoffs
item.description: CONCORD, N.C. (AP) — When rain disrupted Kyle Larson's bid to complete both the Indianapolis 500 and the Coca-Cola 600 on the same day — leaving him unable to turn a single lap at Charlotte Motor Speedway — he returned to the track determined to put on a show.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter leaves game against Kansas State with apparent shoulder injury
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter left the Buffaloes' 31-28 loss to No. 18 Kansas State late in the second quarter Saturday night after a right shoulder injury on a 14-yard reception. Three other Buffs receivers were injured in the game: speedster Jimmy Horn Jr.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dodgers vs. Padres: Who is favored to win tonight's NLDS Game 5?
item.description: LOS ANGELES - Friday night’s winner-take-all NL Division Series Game 5 between the San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers promises to be a thrilling finale to a contentious series between the division rivals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
